{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Scrutiny", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
• Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge is useless without the wisdom to apply it selectively." —Jalira, Master Polymorphist", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare"}, {"name": "Fatal Strike", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target non-artifact creature.", "flavor_text": ""Every warrior has a weakness. Finding it is just a matter of patience." —Geth, Lord of the Vault", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common"}, {"name": "Crypt Harvester", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Cleric", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill three cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "It tends the dead with the devotion of a gardener nurturing seedlings.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Vorthak, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon Lord", "oracle_text": "Flying, menace
When ~ enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "Where he walks, the boundary between life and death crumbles to dust.", "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic"}, {"name": "Molten Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""Subtlety is for those who lack sufficient firepower." —Chandra Nalaar", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common"}]}
